expectations.evidence: Starts with '# Investigativna sprava: YEMANITY s.r.o.' — uses Slovak diacritics throughout, doesn't follow the deep dive INVESTIGATIVNA SPRAVA template. Uses numbered sections (1-9) instead of CONFIRMED/INCONCLUSIVE structure.
All 6 contracts appear as separate subsections (Zmluva 1-6) with IDs 11889441, 12036751, 12088132, 12058696, 12075436, 12059873.
Section 3.1: 'NACE 70220 = Poradenstvo v oblasti podnikania a riadenia. Skutocna cinnost = Stavebne prace'. Explains obchádzanie.
No ASCII network diagram anywhere in the report.
All 6 contracts have CRZ URLs embedded as markdown links.
Missing contract 802/2025 and kupna zmluva are mentioned in section 3.5 as risk factors, but there are no separate INCONCLUSIVE sections with 'Co nevieme' and 'Dalsie kroky'.
Ends with 'Datumvyhotovenia: 17. marec 2026' and 'Platnost dat' note. No 'Dakujeme Zltej Stope'.
Uses space formatting with Slovak commas: '892 261,56 EUR', '467 641,57 EUR'. Consistent.
